title: mT5 Bidirectional EN-TR Machine Translation (ONNX INT8 & ORT Mobile)
description: Fine-tuned an mT5-small model with 8-bit LoRA for bidirectional English-Turkish translation (EN<->TR). Achieved a 5x model size reduction (500MB → 100MB) and optimized performance for resource-constrained environments by applying model pruning, ONNX compilation, and INT8 quantization for mobile deployment via ONNX Runtime (ORT Mobile).
techStack: Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face PEFT (LoRA), ONNX Runtime, INT8 Quantization, SLM

title: Apple Detection and Quality Analysis System
description: An industrial computer vision application featuring real-time object detection, physical dimension measurement, and CIEDE2000 color quality analysis. Focused on system integration, designing the application architecture, and orchestrating the end-to-end pipeline—integrating the camera SDK, real-time YOLOv8-seg model inference, and measurement modules into a unified desktop interface.
techStack: Python, PyQt5, OpenCV, YOLOv8, MVS SDK

title: Arduino PC System Monitor
description: A TinyML-powered system that monitors PC hardware resources (CPU, RAM, GPU, VRAM) and automatically optimizes power consumption. The system extracts hardware telemetry in real-time, executing an on-device SVM classification model on an Arduino Leonardo to determine and adjust the system's power state.

title: Zettelkasten AI Notes (Pupilica AI Hackathon — Top 10 Finalist)
description: A knowledge management desktop application built around the Zettelkasten method. Features an LLM-powered structured information extraction and parsing pipeline that processes PDF documents via the Google Gemini API to extract atomic notes, automatically formats them using customized templates, and orchestrates links between notes. All processed content is stored in a local SQLite database.
techStack: Python, PyQt5, SQLite, Google Gemini AI
